title: Community Retraining and Opportunities Initiative - Funding Program - Apply - Canada.ca
content:
Eligible organizations can apply to this continuous intake by submitting an expression of interest. Applications will be accepted until funding has been fully committed.
Submit your expressions of interest with all the required information by email EDSC.DGOP.ICPPPE-CROI.POB.ESDC@servicecanada.gc.ca . Your expression of interest must include all mandatory information to be assessed.
Please note: The Department will fund only one project per layoff event.

### Confirmation of receipt
Once you submit your expression of interest by email, you will receive confirmation of receipt. If your expression of interest is incomplete, the Department will send you an email to confirm the missing information. You will have 5 business days to submit the missing information.

### How your expression of interest is assessed
The Department will review your expression of interest and confirm eligibility within 3 to 4 business days. If your expression of interest is eligible, you will be invited to submit a project application.
Organizations invited to apply will be asked to complete their application within 20 business days to be considered for this funding opportunity.
The Department will assess other criteria at the application phase. An invitation to apply does not guarantee success.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
